name: gam-monorepo
description: GAM - Monorepo with cms and user-web applications

scripts.build: yarn workspace @gam/user-web build && yarn workspace @gam/cms build
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @gam/user-web lint && yarn workspace @gam/cms lint
scripts.lint:fix: yarn workspace @gam/user-web lint:fix && yarn workspace @gam/cms lint:fix
scripts.test: yarn workspace @gam/user-web test && yarn workspace @gam/cms test
